mapper.sql: id, name, repo_url, default_branch, provider, model, profile_key, validation_commands, forbidden_paths, max_parallel, enabled, version, created_by, create_time, updated_by, update_time
mapper.select:
select p.id, p.name, p.repo_url as repoUrl, p.default_branch as defaultBranch, p.provider, p.model, p.profile_key as profileKey, p.max_parallel as maxParallel, p.enabled, p.version, p.update_time as updateTime, sum(case when t.status in ('queued','claimed','running') then 1 else 0 end) as activeTaskCount, sum(case when t.status = 'awaiting_review' then 1 else 0 end) as reviewTaskCount from ai_project p left join ai_task t on t.project_id = p.id
(p.name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or p.repo_url like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
and p.enabled = #{enabled}
group by p.id order by p.enabled desc, p.update_time desc, p.id desc
select from ai_project where id = #{id} for update
mapper.insert: insert into ai_project (name, repo_url, default_branch, provider, model, profile_key, validation_commands, forbidden_paths, max_parallel, enabled, version, created_by, create_time, updated_by, update_time) values (#{name}, #{repoUrl}, #{defaultBranch}, #{provider}, #{model}, #{profileKey}, #{validationCommands}, #{forbiddenPaths}, #{maxParallel}, #{enabled}, 1, #{createdBy}, #{createTime}, #{updatedBy}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: update ai_project set name = #{name}, repo_url = #{repoUrl}, default_branch = #{defaultBranch}, provider = #{provider}, model = #{model}, profile_key = #{profileKey}, validation_commands = #{validationCommands}, forbidden_paths = #{forbiddenPaths}, max_parallel = #{maxParallel}, enabled = #{enabled}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, update_time = #{updateTime}, version = version + 1 where id = #{id} and version = #{version}
